message:
feat(tui): add hit-region and focus invariant tests (1mfw3.4.5)

New test coverage for the responsive layout's hit-region management
and focus toggle behaviour:

- hit_regions_cleared_in_narrow_single_pane: verifies split handle is
  None in narrow mode and results inner is populated
- dual_pane_records_both_hit_regions: asserts results, detail, and
  split handle are all recorded at MediumNarrow/Medium/Wide widths
- focus_toggle_switches_region: round-trips Results↔Detail focus
- narrow_focus_toggle_swaps_visible_pane: confirms toggling focus in
  narrow mode swaps which pane is rendered
- analytics_surface_clears_search_regions: entering analytics resets
  results and split handle hit regions
- split_handle_absent_prevents_drag: mouse drag in narrow mode is a
  no-op since no split handle region exists

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
